description: Fulfillment & Persistence - Implement receipts and backend sync

userStories.title: Implement receipt printing logic
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to print physical receipts so I can give them to customers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add window.print() trigger to 'Print Receipt' button
Create a print-only CSS media query to format the ticket cleanly
Includes brand logo, order ID, items, and total

userStories.title: Implement download document fallback
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to download a digital receipt if I cannot print.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate a simple PDF or layout-balanced HTML document for download
